prompt: Ultra-stylized high-fashion editorial poster featuring a confident young Asian female model, centered in frame, elegant posture, glossy radiant skin, soft dewy makeup, long silky black hair with wispy bangs, wearing trendy K-fashion streetwear with premium styling details. Clean studio lighting, high-contrast fashion flash photography, sharp focus, ultra-detailed textures, cinematic composition. Background packed with vibrant retro pop-art magazine aesthetics, layered graphic typography, dynamic UI-inspired design elements, holographic chrome effects, stickers including stars, hearts and sparkles, barcode strips, speech bubbles, futuristic collage layering. Japanese and Korean typographic accents woven in as visual design elements. Overall vibe blends nostalgic 2000s teen fashion magazine energy with modern luxury editorial campaign style. Bold color harmony, premium print quality, 8K resolution, polished commercial poster look, surreal yet stylish, trend-forward global fashion branding.
